items.headline: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Question
items.summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

items.headline: Why Strategy, Coinbase Stocks Are Rising When Bitcoin Is Falling
items.summary: Strategy, Coinbase and other crypto-related stocks were rebounding Thursday even as Bitcoin and other digital assets were falling.  It seems the cohort of crypto-exposed names was joining the broad-based tech rally ahead of the open rather than succumbing to the pressure on Bitcoin.  Strategy  the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, was up more than 1% ahead of the open after slumping 5% in the previous session.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Coinbase (COIN) Launches Tokenized Stocks And AI Advisor Beyond Crypto
items.summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has launched tokenized equities for non US customers, giving users on its platform access to real tokenized stocks. At the same time, Coinbase introduced an AI powered investment advisor that offers regulatory compliant, personalized trade execution across supported assets. The rollout extends Coinbase beyond its crypto focus into a broader, multi asset marketplace that also includes options, prediction markets and tokenized real world assets. Coinbase Global...
